# Riverside Research and Anduril Collaborate to Cyber Harden Critical Defense Capabilities

Riverside Research, a national security nonprofit serving the Department of Defense and Intelligence Community, and Anduril Industries announced a collaboration to apply DARPA's formal methods technologies to further protect Anduril's Lattice software platform from cyber attacks.
